meaning: adj.有精神的,快活的,聪明的
examples: More now from Harry Peart in Berlin.
The first made-to-measure Tupli shoe that Ms. Peart designed for herself was a black and red pump for an event at work.
"The shoes were so gorgeous and unusual, so I immediately asked her where she got them," said Ms. Peart, of West Orange, n.j..
The BBC's Harry Peart says the allegations will inflame further a volatile situation within Kenyan football.
The first person to carry the flame there was Elaine Peart, who has bipolar disorder.
